description: Yggdrasil address derivation test vectors. SHA-512(Ed25519 pubkey), format as 02xx per Yggdrasil (addr[0]=0x02, addr[1]=0x02, addr[2:9]=hash[0:7], lower=0). Independent oracle from Yggdrasil reference impls. All Rust/C/Python MUST match bit-exact.

vectors.name: zero-key
vectors.description: Zero pubkey. Matches SHA512 first bytes with 0x02 prefix.

vectors.name: repeating-01
vectors.description: Repeating 0x01 pubkey. Updated to match derivation.
